message:
style: rustfmt 2024 line-wrapping in bulkhead, leak_check, epoll, tests

Apply rustfmt 2024 edition line-wrapping to five files that were modified
by concurrent agents after the initial formatting pass:

- combinator/bulkhead.rs: wrap long method chain in enqueue()
- obligation/leak_check.rs: collapse single-element vec arms, wrap
  assert_with_log! macro invocation
- runtime/reactor/epoll.rs: wrap long io::Error method chains in tests
- tests/repro_region_lifecycle.rs: collapse RuntimeBuilder chain
- asupersync-macros scope_return_in_body.stderr: update expected line
  numbers and span width after DummyCx stub insertion

No functional changes beyond formatting normalization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 error: scope! body must not use return; use break or early return pattern
- --> tests/compile_fail/scope_return_in_body.rs:5:18
+ --> tests/compile_fail/scope_return_in_body.rs:7:18
   |
-5 |     scope!(cx, { return 42; });
-  |                  ^^^^^^
+7 |     scope!(cx, { return 42; });
+  |                  ^^^^^^^^^
